'''Genian''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] world. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] remained neutral during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] due to its vast corporate holdings, research labs, and secure banks. Many [[Senator/Legends|Senators]], both [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] alike, would store their money here, due to its neutrality. Its large, prosperous cities included [[Bruit]], located near a rocky desert surrounded by mountain ranges. [[Fry Industries]] was headquartered on Genian.

{{Planet-stub}}
